title: INSTRUCTRAG: INSTRUCTING RETRIEVAL AUGMENTED GENERATION VIA SELF-SYNTHESIZED RATIONALES

defines.name: INSTRUCTRAG
defines.definition: A RAG framework that teaches language models to explicitly denoise retrieved documents by generating self-synthesized rationales before producing answers.

problem: Standard RAG methods implicitly handle noisy or misleading retrieved content, making denoising difficult to interpret, verify, and supervise.
